Economy & Markets.title: Will the US enter a recession in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Recessions reduce ethanol and feed demand, lower land values, and tighten farm credit access.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed cut rates before July 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Rate cuts lower operating loan costs and can weaken the dollar, boosting grain export competitiveness.

Economy & Markets.title: Will US CPI inflation stay above 3% through June 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Persistent inflation keeps input costs elevated while squeezing consumer purchasing power for food.

Trade & Policy.title: Will new US agricultural tariffs be imposed in 2026?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Tariffs directly impact export demand for US grains and invite retaliatory measures from trading partners.

Weather & Climate.title: Will the US Corn Belt experience severe drought in summer 2026?
Weather & Climate.why_it_matters: Drought is the single biggest yield risk — Corn Belt drought can move corn prices $1+/bu in weeks.

Commodities.title: Will H5N1 bird flu cause another major US poultry cull in 2026?
Commodities.why_it_matters: Bird flu outbreaks spike egg prices and cut feed demand, with downstream effects across the protein complex.
